revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox | name = Ōtori Faith | title = {{ill|Ōtori Faith|lt=Ōtori Faith|simple|Ōtori Faith|ja|大鳥信仰}} | titlestyle = background:#767C6B; color:#fff; | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] | groupstyle = background:#8f9484; color:#fff; | group1 = Main | list1 = * {{ill|Ōtori Faith|ja|大鳥信仰}} * {{ill|Ōtori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社}} * {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市}} | group2 = Main Shrines | list2 = * {{..."
Text replacement - "酉の市}}" to "酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}}"
Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-20]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:{{subst:PAGENAME}}}}[[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|大鳥大社}}" to "|大鳥大社|1=Ōtori taisha}}"
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "[[Category:Original templates]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Original templates]]</noinclude>"
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Otori Faith]] to [[Template:Ōtori Faith]]
Text replacement - "Otori Faith" to "Ōtori Faith"
Text replacement - "鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)" to "鷲神社"
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|" to "|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|"
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Ōtori Faith]]
Bot: fix redirect [[Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)]] → [[Ōtori Shrine]]
Bot: fix redirect [[Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)]] → [[Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
